note: v307: Settings redesigned as a two-pane layout on desktop — a section list on the left (Appearance, Notifications, Invoice defaults, Expense categories, Security, Account, Legal) and one focused panel on the right, the pattern used by macOS/Linear/Notion settings. Replaces the ragged two-column card wall from v306: no more uneven columns or hollow boxes, and the width is filled by real structure. On phones the nav hides and every section stacks as before.
